description: Bootstrap a near-Hadamard 668x668 matrix from H_4 tensor M_167, where M_167 derives from the Paley conference matrix of order 167. Local refinement corrects defects to achieve exact orthogonality. Leverages the structural proximity 668 = 4 x 167.
mathematical_formalization: C_167 Paley conference matrix. M = [1 j^T; -j C] order 168. Extract 167x167 submatrix M'. H' = H_4 tensor M'. Minimize ||H'H'^T - 668I||_F via entry flipping.
implementation_hypothesis: Build Paley H(168). Delete row/col for 167x167. Form H_4 tensor M'. SA with entry-flipping to minimize Frobenius defect.
experiment_seed: Construct scaffold. Measure initial defect. Run SA for 10^8 iterations. Track convergence.
